_comment: PUBLIC registrant contact for Free For Charity (umbrella owner). PUBLIC INFORMATION ONLY: every value here is intended to be publicly visible (it matches FFC's public 501(c)(3) record) and is what is used as the WHOIS registrant for FFC-owned charity domains. Do NOT put any individual charity's private contact details here - those live only in WHMCS (see scripts/whmcs-client-add.ps1 / whmcs-contact-add.ps1). This file is the registrant used by the Cloudflare Registrar flow; it is independent of WHMCS client records.

address.street1: TODO: FFC public North Carolina street address (from public 501(c)(3) record)
